mapper.insert:
insert into fr_annotation ( area, perimeter, category_id, description, location_type, annotation_type,
contour40000,
create_by, update_by, slide_id, id, contour_type, single_slide_id, single, create_time )values( #{area}, #{perimeter}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{locationType}, #{annotationType},
st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}),
#{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{slideId}, #{id}, #{contourType}, #{singleSlideId}, #{single}, now() )
mapper.update:
update fr_annotation
category_id = #{categoryId}, description = #{description}, area = #{area}, perimeter = #{perimeter}, location_type = #{locationType}, annotation_type = #{annotationType}, update_by = #{updateBy},
contour40000 = st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}),
contour_polygon = st_geomfromgeojson(#{contourPolygon}),
id = #{id}, update_time = now()
where annotation_id = #{annotationId}
mapper.select: SELECT n_live_tup FROM pg_stat_user_tables where schemaname = 'public' and relname = 'fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber}'
select count(*) from pg_class where relname = 'fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber}'
mapper.insert:
insert into fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber} ( area, perimeter, category_id , contour40000, contour625, contour2500, contour10000, contour5000, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, slide_id, single_slide_id, structure_size, cell_type, id ) values
( #{item.area}, #{item.perimeter}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.contour40000}, #{item.contour625}, #{item.contour2500}, #{item.contour10000}, #{item.contour5000}, -- st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour40000}), -- st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour625}), -- st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour2500}), -- st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour10000}), -- st_geomfromgeojson(#{item.contour5000}), #{item.locationType}, #{item.annotationType}, #{item.createBy}, NOW(), #{item.slideId}, #{item.singleSlideId}, #{item.structureSize}, #{item.cellType}, #{item.id} )
mapper.select: select annotation_id, area, perimeter, description, category_id, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, slide_id, id, contour_type, single_slide_id, single, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour40000) AS contour, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour40000) AS contour40000, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour10000) AS contour10000, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour2500) AS contour2500, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour625) AS contour625 from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}

select annotation_id, area, perimeter, description, category_id, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, slide_id, id, contour_type, single_slide_id, single, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour40000) AS contour, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour40000) AS contour40000, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour10000) AS contour10000, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour2500) AS contour2500, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour625) AS contour625 from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}

select annotation_id, area, perimeter, description, category_id, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, slide_id, id, contour_type, single_slide_id, single, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour40000) AS contour, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour40000) AS contour40000, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour10000) AS contour10000, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour2500) AS contour2500, ST_AsGeoJSON(contour625) AS contour625 from fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber} where annotation_id = #{annotationId}

select.if: select ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Union((select contour from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}),st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}))) as contour
select ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Difference((select contour from fr_annotation where annotation_id = #{annotationId}),st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}))) as contour

mapper.select: SELECT GeometryType(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as location_type
SELECT category_id FROM fr_annotation WHERE slide_id = #{slideId} AND category_id != 0 GROUP BY category_id

SELECT st_asgeojson(st_union(contour)) as collectContour FROM fr_annotation WHERE single_slide_id = #{singleSlideId}
AND contour_type = 1
SELECT st_area ( st_union ( contour ) ) AS area, ST_Perimeter ( ST_Collect ( contour ) ) AS perimeter FROM fr_annotation WHERE single_slide_id = #{singleSlideId} AND contour_type = 3
SELECT ST_Intersects(st_geomfromgeojson(#{collectContour}), st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as intersectsResults
select ST_IsValid(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as results

select ST_IsValid(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour40000})) as results40000, ST_IsValid(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour10000})) as results10000, ST_IsValid(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour2500})) as results2500, ST_IsValid(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour625})) as results625
select ST_Perimeter(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as perimeter, ST_Area(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as area, ST_Area(ST_MakeValid(st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour}))) as effectiveArea
SELECT ST_Contains(st_geomfromgeojson(#{collectContour}), st_geomfromgeojson(#{contour})) as Results
SELECT st_asgeojson(contour40000) as contour FROM fr_annotation where contour_type = 3 and ST_IsValid(contour40000) = 't' and single_slide_id = #{singleSlideId}

SELECT st_asgeojson ( st_closestpoint ( st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourOne} ), st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourTwo} ) ) ) AS contourOne, st_asgeojson ( st_closestpoint ( st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourTwo} ), st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourOne} ) ) ) AS contourTwo
SELECT ST_Distance ( st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourOne} ), st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contourTwo} ) ) AS minDistance
SELECT st_asgeojson(ST_MakeValid ( st_geomfromgeojson ( #{contour} ) ) ) AS contour
mapper.update: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber}; DROP SEQUENCE IF EXISTS fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber}_annotation_id_seq;
mapper.insert: insert into fr_ai_annotation_${specialSequenceNumber} (area, perimeter, description, category_id, contour625, contour2500, contour10000, contour40000, contour5000, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, slide_id, single_slide_id, single, contour_type, structure_size, cell_type, id, dynamic_data) select area, perimeter, description, category_id, contour625, contour2500, contour10000, contour40000, contour5000, location_type, annotation_type, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, slide_id, single_slide_id, single, contour_type, structure_size, cell_type, id, dynamic_data from fr_ai_annotation_${sequenceNumber};
mapper.select:
SELECT ST_IsValid(st_asgeojson(st_union(contour))) as results FROM fr_annotation WHERE single_slide_id = #{singleSlideId}
AND contour_type = 1

SELECT ST_IsValid(st_asgeojson(st_union(contour))) as results FROM fr_annotation WHERE slide_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ( slide_id ) FROM fr_annotation WHERE single_slide_id = #{singleSlideId} ) AND tag_id = #{tagId}
AND contour_type = 1

SELECT st_asgeojson(st_union(contour)) as collectContour FROM fr_annotation WHERE slide_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ( slide_id ) FROM fr_annotation WHERE single_slide_id = #{singleSlideId} ) AND tag_id = #{tagId}
AND contour_type = 1
